member.name: M:RealEstateStar.Clients.Gmail.GmailClientExtensions.AddGmailSender(Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection.IServiceCollection,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Registers using the internal implementation. Requires to be registered first.

member.name: M:RealEstateStar.Clients.Gmail.GmailClientExtensions.AddGmailReader(Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection.IServiceCollection,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Registers using the internal implementation. Requires to be registered first.
